summary: Iteration 45 - Mobile responsiveness testing complete. All requested features verified: 1) AI chat does NOT auto-open on mobile devices, 2) Products page displays correctly with 2-column grid (163.5px x 163.5px), 3) Product detail page shows all sections (ingredients, nutritional info, allergens, variants) readable on mobile, 4) Producer dashboard has responsive sidebar hidden by default with working hamburger menu, 5) Producer orders page shows order cards with 'Marcar como Entregado' button visible for shipped orders, 6) Seller AI Assistant opens and responds to messages.
passed_tests: Mobile Home Page: AI chat does NOT auto-open (isMobile detection working)
Mobile Home Page: AI assistant button visible at bottom-left for manual access
Mobile Products Page: 2-column grid layout (163.5px x 163.5px columns)
Mobile Products Page: 13 product cards displayed correctly
Mobile Products Page: AI chat did not auto-open
Mobile Product Detail: Product image, name, price visible
Mobile Product Detail: Ingredients section with variant indicator '(Original)'
Mobile Product Detail: Nutritional Information section with variant indicator
Mobile Product Detail: Allergens section visible
Mobile Product Detail: Variant selector with 3 options (Original, Infusionado con Romero, Picante con Guindilla)
Mobile Product Detail: Producer card visible
Mobile Product Detail: Page content fits within mobile viewport (no horizontal scroll)
Mobile Producer Dashboard: Sidebar hidden by default (has -translate-x-full class)
Mobile Producer Dashboard: Hamburger menu button visible in header
Mobile Producer Dashboard: Sidebar opens when hamburger clicked (translate-x-0)
Mobile Producer Dashboard: 7 navigation items visible (Overview, My Products, Certificates, Orders, Payments, Mi Tienda, Profile)
Mobile Producer Dashboard: Close button (X) visible in mobile header
Mobile Producer Orders: Order cards displayed correctly
Mobile Producer Orders: 'Marcar como Entregado' button visible for shipped orders
Mobile Producer Orders: Button has correct data-testid='deliver-order-{order_id}'
Mobile Producer Orders: Shipping info (carrier, tracking number) visible
Seller AI Assistant: 'Asistente de Ventas' button visible
Seller AI Assistant: Opens correctly with 'Hispalo AI - Asistente de Ventas' header
Seller AI Assistant: Welcome message displays capabilities
Seller AI Assistant: Quick suggestion chips visible (Sugerir packs, Analizar tendencias, etc.)
Seller AI Assistant: Chat input field functional
Seller AI Assistant: Send button functional
critical_code_review_comments: AIAssistant.js: isMobile state correctly detects viewport < 768px and prevents auto-open
AIAssistant.js: setIsOpen wrapper prevents auto-open on dashboard pages
AIAssistant.js: AI button remains visible on mobile for manual access
ProducerLayout.js: Mobile header with hamburger menu correctly implemented
ProducerLayout.js: Sidebar uses transform classes for show/hide animation
ProducerLayout.js: mobileMenuOpen state controls sidebar visibility
ProducerLayout.js: Overlay closes sidebar when clicked
ProducerOrders.js: 'Marcar como Entregado' button correctly shows for shipped orders
ProducerOrders.js: Button has proper data-testid for testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing producer@test.com with shipped order for testing 'Marcar como Entregado' button
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 45 verified all mobile responsiveness features: 1) AI chat auto-open prevention on mobile works via isMobile state detection (window.innerWidth < 768), 2) Products page uses CSS grid with 2 columns on mobile, 3) Product detail page sections are all visible and readable, 4) Producer dashboard sidebar uses transform classes (-translate-x-full / translate-x-0) for mobile show/hide with hamburger menu, 5) Producer orders shows 'Marcar como Entregado' button for shipped orders with data-testid='deliver-order-{order_id}', 6) Seller AI Assistant (SellerAIAssistant component) opens and functions correctly.

mobile_ai_chat_no_auto_open.details: isMobile state prevents auto-open, button visible for manual access

mobile_products_2_column_grid.details: Grid displays 163.5px x 163.5px columns on 375px viewport

mobile_product_detail.details: All sections visible and readable, no horizontal scroll

mobile_producer_sidebar.details: Hidden by default with -translate-x-full, hamburger opens with translate-x-0

mobile_producer_orders.details: Order cards visible, 'Marcar como Entregado' button shows for shipped orders

seller_ai_assistant.details: Opens correctly, shows welcome message, suggestion chips, and accepts input
